name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Mavinject Inject DLL Into Running Process
notes:
This Building Block detects process injection using the signed Windows tool "Mavinject" via the "INJECTRUNNING" flag.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113, Florian Roth
SIGMA Title: Mavinject Inject DLL Into Running Process
SIGMA Description: Detects process injection using the signed Windows tool "Mavinject" via the "INJECTRUNNING" flag


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Mavinject Inject DLL Into Running Process on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of mavinject.exe
when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '% /injectrunning %' AQL filter query
when the event matches Parent Process Path (custom) is any of C:\Windows\System32\AppVClient.exe
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Mavinject Inject DLL Into Running Process on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of mavinject.exe
AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '% /injectrunning %' AQL filter query
AND NOT when the event matches Parent Process Path (custom) is any of C:\Windows\System32\AppVClient.exe
